offer: For logistics carriers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual procurement causes late orders. We automate procurement workflows instead of manual procurement processes.
problem: Inefficient procurement processes leading to delays and errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where logistics carriers seek help
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Community forums for logistics carriers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try invoice tracking and reporting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Default reminder schedules for easy tracking
CSV import feature for existing data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
